results.description: DESCRIPTION:THE PROJECT WILL UPDATE THE CHEMICAL MECHANISMS RELATED TO DINITROGEN PENTOXIDE (N2O5) CHEMISTRY IN THE CMAQ AIR QUALITY MODEL AND USE THE IMPROVED CMAQ MODEL TO INVESTIGATE THE INFLUENCE OF N2O5 CHEMISTRY ON NOX, OZONE AND FINE PM. THE RESEARCH WILL GENERATE PUBLICATIONS AND FINDINGS THAT LEAD TO IMPROVED UNDERSTANDING OF N2O5 CHEMISTRY AND ITS IMPACTS ON THE FORMATION, FATE, AND TRANSPORT OF NOX, OZONE, AND FINE PARTICULATE MATTER (PM), WHICH ARE AIR POLLUTANTS ASSOCIATED WITH ADVERSE HEALTH IMPACTS.ACTIVITIES:.SUBRECIPIENT:OUTCOMES:.
